name: The Synapse
subtitle: Where women connect mind, machine, and what comes next.
tagline: The Synapse is a conference for women shaping the intersections of AI, robotics, cognitive science, and consciousness -- where the future of intelligence is being co-created.

fiscalSponsor.name: Applied Love Labs
fiscalSponsor.blurb: The Synapse is an initiative of Applied Love Labs. Charitable contributions flow through ALL, which issues tax-deductible receipts in its own name.

mission: Inherited paradigms are no longer sufficient. Across AI, robotics, cognitive science, and consciousness, the questions that matter most require integration -- across disciplines, ways of knowing, and the full range of human intelligence. The Synapse is a gathering for the women at the frontier of each field: researchers, builders, practitioners, and leaders who are not waiting for permission to shape what comes next. This is not a conference about the future. It is the future, in formation.

principles.title: Everyone belongs
principles.body: Every person in the room is here on purpose. No one has to prove their worth to take up space.

principles.title: Engagement over performance
principles.body: Few keynotes. More facilitated dialogue, workshops, art, movement, and structured time for the conversations that usually only happen in hallways -- or not at all.

principles.title: Speakers are compensated
principles.body: The ethos of equality starts with what we value enough to fund.

principles.title: Women-centered, ally-welcoming
principles.body: Women lead and speak. Anyone who supports the mission is welcome to apply.

principles.title: Small enough to matter
principles.body: 50-75 guests. Deep connection is a design constraint, not a nice-to-have.

principles.title: Reimagining, not resisting
principles.body: We are in dedication to what is possible, not in opposition to what isn't.

placeholderNote: Venue, speaker/participant roster, and session titles are placeholders. Applied Love Labs is confirmed as the host; Atlanta October 9-11, 2026 and the 50-75 capacity are confirmed. Copy across hero, four fields, ethos, program arc, apply, support, and FAQ sections follows Kelly's approved Website Copy doc and Messaging Guide.
